title: Woman who stole £300k from pensioner and spent it on Botox and lavish meals is tracked down in Tenerife
description: Pamela Gwinnett raided the life savings of 89-year-old Joan Green before fleeing to Tenerife. After being sentenced in her absence to six years, Sky News confronts the fraudster outside her home on the Spanish island.
content:
A "shameless" fraudster who stole £300,000 from a vulnerable pensioner and spent it on Botox and other luxuries has been tracked down by Sky News in Tenerife.
Pamela Gwinnett isolated 89-year-old Joan Green from her family while pretending to act as ... [5433 chars]

title: The mole hanging photos dividing social media
description: A hill walker shares a snap of moles hanging on barbed wire and is surprised by the huge response.
content:
"It seemed to really strike a nerve," he says.
Lucas, 61, a musician from Bristol, travels to the Lake District in Cumbria for one week every month and regularly posts pictures of his wanderings.

title: The Magic Faraway Tree's Andrew Garfield: Our attention is abused by tech companies
description: Garfield stars alongside Claire Foy and Nicola Coughlan in an adaptation of Enid Blyton's The Magic Faraway Tree.
content:
For many families, it's a familiar scene: heads bent over glowing screens, conversations half-heard and the outside world slowly slipping into the background.
That sense of disconnection sits at the heart of a new adaptation of Enid Blyton's beloved ... [2617 chars]

title: France's Socialists hold onto power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
description: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
content:
Socialists and allies held on to power France's big four cities - Paris, Marseille, Lyon and Lille - on a local election night that offered hopes for mainstream parties in next year's presidential elections.
The new aspirants of the far-left and far-... [4748 chars]

title: First charge for tailgating under new law targeting ticketless football fans
description: On Sunday, it became a criminal offence to enter a football game in England and Wales without a ticket.
content:
A man has become the first person to be charged under a new law banning football fans from entering a game in England and Wales without a ticket.
The legislation came into force on Sunday, in time for the match between Arsenal and Manchester City at ... [1716 chars]
